external_auth_login_failed_desc: The identity provider did not complete this sign-in. Try again.
external_auth_account_recovery_desc: This external sign-in attempt could not be matched to a local account automatically. Sign in to an existing account to link it, or continue with email verification if you do not have a local account.
external_auth_email_verification_desc: Enter your email and AsterDrive will continue with its own verification email.
external_auth_email_verification_hint: Sign in to an existing AsterDrive account first to link this external identity. Use email verification only when creating an account or confirming ownership of a local email address.
external_auth_email_verification_sent_hi: Open the link in the email to finish signing in. You can close this page.
external_auth_email_verification_sent_to: Verification email sent. Check your inbox.
external_auth_email_verification_missing: This external auth email verification link does not contain a usable token.
external_auth_email_verification_invalid: This external auth email verification link is invalid or has already been used. Start external sign-in again.
external_auth_email_verification_expired: This external auth email verification link has expired. Start external sign-in again.
